changes.comment: Major release: type-safe storage layer for localStorage and IndexedDB with defineSchema for compile-time table and field types; full CRUD API (get, put, patch, delete, getAll, getMany, putMany, deleteMany, getOr, getOrPut, has, count); fluent QueryBuilder with where, equals, orderBy, limit, offset, filter, search, map, first, last, toArray, and toGrouped; TTL helpers (ttl.seconds/minutes/hours/days/at) for automatic expiry; atomic multi-table transactions; schema migration support via migrationFn
